stemHtml: The flying training for an applicant of a CPL(A) integrated course shall comprise…

options.a: a total of at least 150 flying hours, of which up to 5 hours for the entire course may be instrument ground time.
options.b: a total of at least 200 flying hours, of which up to 10 hours for the entire course may be instrument ground time.
options.c: a total of at least 150 flying hours, instrument ground time not provided.
options.d: a total of at least 200 flying hours, instrument ground time not provided.
